h3b6c47b4gf6e1g43f5g8088g070176d9d576: Have some respect. This really isn't the time to talk.

h6e92bdbfg8d35g4b7dgb758g89261f96b239: Hells, I didn't mean it that way. Halsin's important, but you're the first bit of good faith we've had since he left.
h4f43b437gf1b6g485bgb0f1ge8e7b1a74f8b: Keep your wits about you. Things are tense with the druids here.

h21d130bdgea1bg4871gb6d5g21236d6c3246: Without Halsin... this grove's not so friendly, I'll tell you that.
